# zabbix_user_directory_saml (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix SAML user directory.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_user_directory_saml" "okta" {
  name               = "Okta SSO"
  idp_entityid       = "http://www.okta.com/exkABCDEF1234567890"
  sp_entityid        = "zabbix"
  username_attribute = "email"
  sso_url            = "https://example.okta.com/app/zabbix/exkABCDEF1234567890/sso/saml"
  slo_url            = "https://example.okta.com/app/zabbix/exkABCDEF1234567890/slo/saml"

  sign_messages   = "enabled"
  sign_assertions = "enabled"
  encrypt_nameid  = "disabled"
  scim_status     = "enabled"

  group_name       = "groups"
  user_username    = "firstName"
  user_lastname    = "lastName"
  provision_status = "enabled"

  provision_groups = [
    {
      name           = "zabbix-admins"
      role_id        = zabbix_role.admin.id
      user_group_ids = [zabbix_user_group.admins.id]
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `idp_entityid` (String) IdP entity ID (the IdP metadata URL or URN).
- `name` (String) Display name of the user directory. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `sp_entityid` (String) SP entity ID registered with the IdP.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the user directory.
- `encrypt_assertions` (String) Whether to encrypt SAML assertions. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `encrypt_nameid` (String) Whether to encrypt the NameID. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `group_name` (String) Name of the IdP attribute that carries group membership.
- `nameid_format` (String) NameID format (e.g. `urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:emailAddress`).
- `provision_groups` (Attributes List) IdP group to Zabbix role and user groups mappings for JIT provisioning. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provision_groups))
- `provision_media` (Attributes List) IdP attribute to Zabbix media type mappings for JIT provisioning. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provision_media))
- `provision_status` (String) Whether JIT provisioning is enabled. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `scim_status` (String) Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled for this directory. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `sign_assertions` (String) Whether to sign SAML assertions. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `sign_authn_requests` (String) Whether to sign AuthnRequests. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `sign_logout_requests` (String) Whether to sign logout requests. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `sign_logout_responses` (String) Whether to sign logout responses. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `sign_messages` (String) Whether to sign SAML messages. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `slo_url` (String) IdP SLO service URL.
- `sso_url` (String) IdP SSO service URL.
- `user_lastname` (String) IdP attribute mapped to the Zabbix user last name.
- `user_username` (String) IdP attribute mapped to the Zabbix user first name.
- `username_attribute` (String) SAML attribute used as the Zabbix username.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the user directory.

<a id="nestedatt--provision_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provision_groups`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the IdP group. Use `*` as a wildcard for all groups.
- `role_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix role to assign.
- `user_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of Zabbix user group IDs to assign.


<a id="nestedatt--provision_media"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provision_media`

Required:

- `attribute` (String) IdP attribute value to use as the media send-to address.
- `media_type_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix media type.
- `name` (String) Name of the provision media entry.

Optional:

- `active` (String) Whether the media is active. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `period` (String) Active time period. Defaults to `1-7,00:00-24:00`.
- `severity` (Number) Severity bitmask (0-63). Defaults to `63` (all severities).
